abstract.text: Badge is a UI element that emphasizes system notifications, status, or the categorization of an information, throughout colour only.
Badge is rendered as a coloured shape, without icon, text or number; and its chosen size remains unchanged regardless of the changes of the interface size.
displays a text, as integer, limited to 99.
